with data_bool_to_one_hot as (
    select * from "test_dbt_ml_inline_preprocessing"."main_raw_data"."data_bool_to_one_hot"
)

select
    
    

    

    
        case
            when active is null then 0
            when active then 1
            else 0
        end as is_active,
        case
            when deleted is null then 0
            when deleted then 1
            else 0
        end as is_deleted,
        case
            when verified is null then 0
            when verified then 1
            else 0
        end as is_verified,
    output_is_active as expected_is_active,
    output_is_deleted as expected_is_deleted,
    output_is_verified as expected_is_verified
from data_bool_to_one_hot

with data_k_bins_discretize as (
    select * from "test_dbt_ml_inline_preprocessing"."main_raw_data"."data_k_bins_discretize"
)

select
    

    
        NTILE(5) over (order by input)
    

 as actual_quantile,
    

    
        
        floor(
        (
            input - (min(input) over ())
        )
        /
        nullif(
            ((max(input) over ()) - (min(input) over ())) / 4::float,
            0
        )
        ) + 1
    

 as actual_uniform,
    output_quantile as expected_quantile,
    output_uniform as expected_uniform
from data_k_bins_discretize

)

select

 as actual,

with data_log_transform as (
    select * from "test_dbt_ml_inline_preprocessing"."main_raw_data"."data_log_transform"
)

select
    

    (

    
    case
        when input is null then null
        when (input + 0) >= 0 and 0 != 0
            then (power((input + 0) + 1, 0) - 1) / 0
        when (input + 0) >= 0 and 0 = 0
            then ln((input + 0) + 1)
        when (input + 0) < 0 and 0 != 2
            then -(power(-(input + 0) + 1, 2 - 0) - 1) / (2 - 0)
        when (input + 0) < 0 and 0 = 2
            then -ln(-(input + 0) + 1)
    end

) / ln(10)

 as actual_base10,
    output_base10 as expected_base10,
    

    (

    
    case
        when input is null then null
        when (input + 0) >= 0 and 0 != 0
            then (power((input + 0) + 1, 0) - 1) / 0
        when (input + 0) >= 0 and 0 = 0
            then ln((input + 0) + 1)
        when (input + 0) < 0 and 0 != 2
            then -(power(-(input + 0) + 1, 2 - 0) - 1) / (2 - 0)
        when (input + 0) < 0 and 0 = 2
            then -ln(-(input + 0) + 1)
    end

) / ln(2)

 as actual_base2,
    output_base2 as expected_base2,
    

    (

    
    case
        when input is null then null
        when (input + 1) >= 0 and 0 != 0
            then (power((input + 1) + 1, 0) - 1) / 0
        when (input + 1) >= 0 and 0 = 0
            then ln((input + 1) + 1)
        when (input + 1) < 0 and 0 != 2
            then -(power(-(input + 1) + 1, 2 - 0) - 1) / (2 - 0)
        when (input + 1) < 0 and 0 = 2
            then -ln(-(input + 1) + 1)
    end

) / ln(10)

 as actual_offset1,
    output_offset1 as expected_offset1
from data_log_transform

    select * from "test_dbt_ml_inline_preprocessing"."main_raw_data"."data_min_max_scale"
)

    )
    *
    (1 - 0)
    +
    0

 as actual,

from data_min_max_scale

with data_random_impute_cat as (
    select * from "test_dbt_ml_inline_preprocessing"."main_raw_data"."data_random_impute_cat"
)

select
    

    
        
        

        
        

        
    

    
    case
        
        
        
            
            when input is null
                and mod((row_number() over ()) + 2, 3) = 0
                    then  'bear' 
        
            
            when input is null
                and mod((row_number() over ()) + 2, 3) = 1
                    then  'cat' 
        
            
            when input is null
                and mod((row_number() over ()) + 2, 3) = 2
                    then  'dog' 
        
        else input
    end

 as actual
from data_random_impute_cat
